{{Quote|Nothing unusual at Bilbringi. Tenel Ka and Jovan Drark have stationed themselves in public places, looking for dead spots in the Force that could be Yuuzhan Vong in masquers. The same from Markre Medjev, finishing up his research on Bothawui.|Luke Skywalker reports on the status of Jedi during the Yuuzhan Vong War|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Balance Point">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref>}}
'''Markre Medjev''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He later went on to obtain the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Chief Librarian/Legends|Chief Librarian]] after the conclusion of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
===Yuuzhan Vong War===
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Markre Medjev entered into the fledgling [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Traveling to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], the young Medjev was granted admittance into the [[Jedi Praxeum]] there where he began his [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]] even as the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] began their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|campaign of terror]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. After his basic instruction in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] were complete, Medjev was dispatched to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] where he conducted intensive research on the alien invaders before reporting back to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on his findings.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Balance Point" />

Surviving the conflict which followed, Medjev participated in the final stages of the war. While on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] during the fourth year of the war, Medjev met with eleven other Jedi in Master [[Tresina Lobi]]'s quarters to discuss several issues. Before the meeting, Medjev worked with Tresina and Master [[Cilghal]] to prepare food for the Jedi. When the meeting began, Master [[Kenth Hamner]] informed everyone that [[Wraith Squadron]] member [[Baljos Arnjak]] was on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and reported that [[Nom Anor|The Prophet]] was on the planet, despite having previously left with Jedi [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] for the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], where Master Skywalker and several other Jedi were. With communications to Zonama Sekot lost, and Master [[Cilghal]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] believing it to have moved, the only way to learn what had happened would be to talk with the Prophet. Medjev suggested they ask [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] for help in infiltrating Coruscant, but Hamner told him he would not want to force Antilles to lie to his superiors, and the Jedi resolved to wait one week for word from Skywalker before sending a strike team to capture the Prophet.<ref name="TUF" />

Before the week deadline was up, Zonama Sekot appeared in orbit around Coruscant, and caused the Yuuzhan Vong to withdraw from their [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] on Dac. Medjev and the other Jedi were later summoned to the living planet by Master Skywalker, and Medjev traveled with more than a dozen other Jedi aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] to the planet. Medjev and the others met with Master Skywalker, who told them about the mysterious planet. Medjev then participated in a ceremony in which he bonded with two [[seed-partner]]s, which were able to be molded into a [[Zonama Sekotan fighter|living ship]] for him to pilot. Fighting against the invaders in defense of Sekot, Medjev and the Jedi were successful as the Yuuzhan Vong threat was nullified when their weapons and ships returned to their natural state amongst the bizarre environment of the planet. Gathering with the remaining Jedi on the planet, Medjev was present for the [[Conclave on Zonama Sekot|meeting that reunified the Order]] and solidified their placement within the newly created [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].<ref name="TUF" />

===Master of the Archives===
As of [[44 ABY]], Medjev had obtained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and completed his training as a [[Lore Keeper|Jedi Lore Keeper]]. Appointed as [[Chief Librarian/Legends|Chief Librarian]], Master Medjev oversaw and protected the [[New Jedi Temple|Jedi Temple]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Medjev assisted [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Natua Wan]] in her work in the Archives after she was assigned there following her recovery from the mysterious [[Force psychosis]]. When [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] Skywalker contacted the Temple and asked for Wan to assist him by researching [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Planet/Legends|planets]], Medjev informed the young Jedi Knight personally.<ref name="FOTJ" />
